seed.symptoms: White powdery fungal coating on young leaves, shoots, and fruit; leaf curling and distortion; reduced photosynthesis.
seed.causes: Fungus Podosphaera clandestina; thrives in warm dry days and cool nights; spreads via airborne conidia.
seed.treatment: Apply sulfur-based or potassium bicarbonate fungicides; sterol-inhibiting fungicides (myclobutanil) for severe infections.
seed.prevention: Ensure good air circulation; avoid excessive nitrogen; remove infected tissue.
